_comment: Manual corrections applied at build time. 'authors' maps the author exactly as typed in the Sheet to the catalog form shown on cards. 'languages' maps a book title (as in the Sheet, trimmed) to the language it was read in, when it can't be derived from the Wikipedia link domain. 'titles' fixes typos/formatting for display without editing the Sheet. 'imprints' adds the catalog imprint line on the Now Reading card when known.

imprints.I Regret Almost Everything: I regret almost everything. — New York : Gallery Books, 2025. — memoir.
